content:
ITEM 4. MINE SAFETY DISCLOSURES
Not applicable.
ITEM 4A. INFORMATION ABOUT OUR EXECUTIVE OFFICERS
The following sets forth certain information regarding our current executive officers as of [DATE_TIME] (in alphabetical order):
[PERSON] has served as our Chief Accounting Officer and Corporate Controller since [DATE_TIME]. Prior to that, Mr. [PERSON] served as our Senior Vice President, Chief Accountant and Corporate Controller since [DATE_TIME], Senior Vice President, Corporate Controller from [DATE_TIME], and served in various other management positions in finance since joining Salesforce in [DATE_TIME]. Prior to Salesforce, Mr. [PERSON] spent [DATE_TIME] at Autodesk, Inc. and [DATE_TIME] at Chiron Corporation in key corporate finance positions. Previously, he worked at Arthur Andersen LLP for [DATE_TIME] in its Audit and Business Advisory Services group. Mr. [PERSON] also serves on the Board of Trustees of the University of San Francisco. Mr. [PERSON] graduated from Santa Clara University with a B.S. in Accounting.
[PERSON] is Chair, CEO and co-Founder of Salesforce and a pioneer of cloud computing. Under Mr. [PERSON]’s leadership, Salesforce is the fastest-growing top-five enterprise software company and the #1 provider of CRM software globally. Mr. [PERSON] was named Innovator of [DATE_TIME] by Forbes and recognized as one of the World’s 50 Greatest Leaders by Fortune and one of the 10 Best-Performing CEOs by Harvard Business Review. A member of the World Economic Forum Board of Trustees, Mr. [PERSON] serves as the inaugural chair of [DATE_TIME]’s Forum Center for the Fourth Industrial Revolution in [LOCATION]. Mr. [PERSON] also serves as chair of the Salesforce Foundation. Mr. [PERSON] received a B.S. in Business Administration from the University of Southern California, where he is on its Board of Trustees.
[PERSON] has served as our President and Chief Strategy Officer since [DATE_TIME]. Prior to that, he served as our President and Chief Product Officer since [DATE_TIME], President, Products from [DATE_TIME], President, Applications and Platform from [DATE_TIME], Executive Vice President, Applications from [DATE_TIME], Executive Vice President, Product Management from [DATE_TIME], and Senior Vice President, Product Management from [DATE_TIME]. Mr. [PERSON] joined Salesforce through the acquisition of InStranet, a leading knowledge-base company, where he was a founder and served as CEO. Prior to InStranet, Mr. [PERSON] was a founding member of Business Objects SA where he led the product group for [DATE_TIME]. Mr. [PERSON], who holds several patents, is focused on creating business value out of technology disruption. Mr. [PERSON] holds a master’s degree in electrical engineering from Ecole Supérieure d'Electricité (SUPELEC) in [LOCATION].
[PERSON] has served as a Director since [DATE_TIME] and as our co-Founder and Chief Technology Officer since [DATE_TIME]. Mr. [PERSON] co-founded Salesforce in [DATE_TIME] and has served in senior technical positions since inception. Prior to that, from [DATE_TIME], Mr. [PERSON] served as our Executive Vice President, Technology. Prior to Salesforce, Mr. [PERSON] was a Vice President at Left Coast Software, a Java consulting firm he co-founded, from [DATE_TIME]. Mr. [PERSON] received a [LOCATION] from Middlebury College.
[PERSON] has served as our President and Chief Financial Officer and Principal Financial Officer since [DATE_TIME]. Prior to that, he served as our Chief Financial Officer, Principal Financial Officer and Executive Vice President since [DATE_TIME]. Prior to Salesforce, Mr. [PERSON] served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer and principal financial officer for Autodesk, Inc., a design software and services company, from [DATE_TIME]. From [DATE_TIME], Mr. [PERSON] served as Senior Vice President, Finance and Information Technology, and Chief Financial Officer of Logitech International S.A. Previously, Mr. [PERSON] held various finance and business-management roles with Dell Inc. and Hewlett-Packard Company. Mr. [PERSON] currently serves as a director of Plex Systems, Inc., where he is the Chairman of the Audit Committee, and SecureWorks, Inc., where he is also a member of the Compensation Committee and the Chairman of the Audit Committee. Mr. [PERSON] holds a [LOCATION] in Operations Management from Michigan State University and an M.B.A. in Finance from the University of Colorado. He also completed the Advanced Management Program at Harvard Business School.
[PERSON] has served as our President and Chief People Officer since [DATE_TIME]. Prior to joining Salesforce, Mr. [PERSON] served in several senior management roles at Gap Inc., a global clothing and accessories retailer, from [DATE_TIME] to [DATE_TIME], including Executive Vice President and Chief People Officer from [DATE_TIME], Executive Vice President, Global Talent and Sustainability from [DATE_TIME], Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer, Gap from [DATE_TIME], and Senior Vice President, Human Resources, Gap from [DATE_TIME]. Mr. [PERSON] holds a [LOCATION] in retail management from Brigham Young University.
[PERSON] has served as our President and Chief Engineering Officer since [DATE_TIME]. Prior to that, he served as President, Technology since [DATE_TIME], Executive Vice President, Engineering from [DATE_TIME] and Senior Vice President, Engineering from [DATE_TIME]. From [DATE_TIME], Mr. [PERSON] served as a Senior Vice President at Oracle. From [DATE_TIME] Mr. [PERSON] served as a Senior Vice President at SAP. Previously, Mr. [PERSON] held various roles at Oracle, Infosys and Asian Paints. Mr. [PERSON] holds a masters degree from the School of Human Resources at XLRI, [LOCATION] and a B.T. in Computer Science from the National Institute of Technology, [PERSON].
[PERSON] has served as our President and Chief Operating Officer since [DATE_TIME]. Prior to that, he served as our President and Chief Product Officer from [DATE_TIME] and President, Quip from [DATE_TIME]. Mr. [PERSON] joined Salesforce through the acquisition of Quip, Inc., where he was a co-founder and served as CEO since [DATE_TIME]. Previously, Mr. [PERSON] served as Chief Technology Officer of Facebook, Inc. from [DATE_TIME] and Chief Executive Officer of FriendFeed, Inc., a social network, from [DATE_TIME] to [DATE_TIME]. From [DATE_TIME], Mr. [PERSON] served as an entrepreneur-in-residence at Benchmark, a venture capital firm. [DATE_TIME], Mr. [PERSON] served as Group Product Manager at Google Inc. Mr. [PERSON] currently serves as a director of Twitter, Inc., where he is also a member of the Compensation Committee. He previously served on the Board of Directors of Axon Enterprise, Inc. (formerly known as TASER International, Inc.), a protection technologies company. Mr. [PERSON] holds a B.S. and an M.S. in Computer Science from Stanford University.
[PERSON] has served as our President and Chief Legal Officer since [DATE_TIME]. Prior to that, she served as our President, Legal & Corporate Affairs and General Counsel from [DATE_TIME], our Executive Vice President and General Counsel from [DATE_TIME] and our Senior Vice President and General Counsel from [DATE_TIME]. Prior to Salesforce, Ms. [PERSON] served as Executive Vice President and General Counsel at Univar Inc. from [DATE_TIME]. Previously, Ms. [PERSON] was Senior Vice President and Deputy General Counsel at Expedia, Inc. and before that she practiced law at Cravath, Swaine & Moore LLP and Perkins Coie LLP. Ms. [PERSON] also served as a clerk on the U.S. Court of Appeals, Ninth Circuit and as a legislative assistant to a member of the Hong Kong Legislative Council. Ms. [PERSON] holds a [LOCATION] in Political Science from Wellesley College and a J.D. from Harvard Law School.
PART II.
ITEM 5.
